proposal_text.raw_text:
BID-001-Q01 Vendor Quote
Vendor Quote: BID-001-Q01
Vendor: StartCare Devices 01 (New entrant with limited history)
Legal Entity: StartCare Devices 01 Private Limited
Registered Address: 836, Industrial Estate, Bengaluru, India
Contact: Sameer Khan, sales69@startcaredevices01.example, +91-74090-59615
Company Profile: 1 years in operation, 4 similar hospital references, estimated quote length 14
pages.
Procurement: MRI Machine Procurement - MRI Machine
Commercial Offer: INR 15.84 Cr with 50% advance payment.
Delivery and Warranty: Delivery in 5.6 months. Warranty starts On Commissioning. Installation
responsibility: Buyer.
Training and Service: Training included: False. Service response target: 12 hours. Local service
team: True.
Compliance Claims: IEC 60601, ISO 13485, local regulatory approval.
The quote emphasizes brand reputation, patient confidence, and market differentiation more than
operational details.
Company Details: The vendor states experience with hospital equipment procurement and provides
references where available. Some claims may require verification during technical evaluation.
